sigWerErrors.reason: The only difference is the punctuation (period) after 'minh', which does not affect the meaning or the transcription of the email address. Punctuation differences are to be ignored.

The word 'chấm' (meaning 'dot' in Vietnamese) is missing before 'trần', which is crucial for correctly transcribing an email address. Omitting 'chấm' changes the structure of the email and can lead to an incorrect or undeliverable email address.
